name: The House Always Wins
intro_text: Dr. Armitage has a lead: Dr. Francis Morgan, the other missing professor, was last seen at La Bella Luna — a restaurant connected to the Clover Club, Arkham's most exclusive underground gambling den.
The Clover Club is run by a man named Harlan Earnstone, and rumor has it he has friends in very dark places. Getting inside won't be easy. Getting back out might be harder still.
setup_instructions: Investigators begin at La Bella Luna.
The Clover Club interior (Lounge, Bar, Cardroom, Darkened Hall, Art Gallery, VIP Area) starts hidden.
Naomi's Crew enemies may be used as guards — spawn them per scenario rules.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — Morgan is rescued
text: You find Dr. Morgan in the Clover Club's hidden back rooms, apparently engaged of his own free will — though in a state of spiritual compromise you find deeply unsettling.
He agrees to come with you. Whatever deal he made with Harlan Earnstone, it will have consequences.
Record in the campaign log: *Dr. Morgan was rescued.* Each investigator earns 1 bonus XP.

R2.label: Resolution 2 — Morgan is not found
text: You search the Clover Club thoroughly, but Morgan is nowhere to be found. Harlan Earnstone's men make it clear you have overstayed your welcome.
Record in the campaign log: *Dr. Morgan was not found.* The investigators suffer a penalty in future scenarios.

defeat.label: Defeat — Thrown out
text: Earnstone's muscle escorts you out — not gently. Your investigation of the Clover Club is over before it began.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were defeated at the Clover Club.*
